name: Unsupervised Multimodal Clustering for Semantics Discovery in Multimodal Utterances

description: arXiv:2405.12775v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Discovering the semantics of multimodal utterances is essential for understanding human language and enhancing human-machine interactions. Existing methods manifest limitations in leveraging nonverbal information for discerning complex semantics in unsupervised scenarios. This paper introduces a novel unsupervised multimodal clustering m...
author: Hanlei Zhang, Hua Xu, Fei Long, Xin Wang, Kai Gao
